summary: Bulk Revoke feature E2E testing completed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components functional - Super Admin sees bulk revoke section, regular admin correctly denied access.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement opportunity

critical_code_review_comments: Bulk revoke requires CSRF token for POST requests - properly implemented
Super admin access control enforced at both backend (403 for non-super_admin) and frontend (section hidden)
Validation working: confirmation_text must be 'REVOKE' or advocate's name, reason >= 10 chars
Individual STAMP_REVOKED events logged per stamp with bulk=true and batch_revoke_id in metadata
ADVOCATE_BULK_REVOKE audit event properly logged with all details
seed_data_creation: None - used existing advocate with stamps (37 already revoked from previous test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Revoke feature is fully implemented. APIs: GET /api/admin/advocates/{id}/stamp-summary (returns active/revoked/expired counts), POST /api/admin/advocates/{id}/bulk-revoke (super_admin only, requires CSRF token, confirmation_text='REVOKE' or advocate name, reason min 10 chars), GET /api/admin/bulk-revoke-history (paginated history of bulk revoke actions). Frontend at /admin/advocates route, Manage dialog shows 'Super Admin Actions' section with 'Revoke All Active Stamps' button only for super_admin role.

features_verified.ADVOCATE_BULK_REVOKE audit event: PASS - Logged in audit_logs with all details
features_verified.STAMP_REVOKED events per stamp: PASS - Individual events with bulk=true, batch_revoke_id in metadata
features_verified.GET /api/admin/bulk-revoke-history: PASS - Returns paginated history of bulk revoke actions
